content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
CAUTION: low volatility (Vol: 20.8%) but narrow participation (Breadth: 2/8 sectors positive), signaling a fragile, stock-specific advance.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Energy & Chemicals RECOVERY: TUPRS (1W: +13.23% | 1M: +6.89%) ABOVE TREND; Construction & REIT ABOVE TREND: ENKAI (1W: +3.14% | 1M: -1.32%) RECOVERY, ALARK (1W: -0.29% | 1M: +3.76%) CORRECTION.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Technology & Telecom BELOW TREND: TCELL (1W: -3.34% | 1M: -0.65%) BELOW TREND; Retail & Food BELOW TREND: MGROS (1W: -8.13% | 1M: -4.53%) BELOW TREND; Banking & Finance CORRECTION: AKBNK (1W: -4.53% | 1M: +9.83%) CORRECTION.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TUPRS (1W: +13.23% | 1M: +6.89%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +10.51% | 1M: +10.28%) ABOVE TREND; TRALT (1W: +7.75% | 1M: +4.76%) ABOVE TREND; CCOLA (1W: +5.60% | 1M: +8.88%) ABOVE TREND; TRMET (1W: +5.00% | 1M: -1.59%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
KCHOL (1W: -4.34% | 1M: -0.84%) BELOW TREND; KRDMD (1W: -4.49% | 1M: -2.17%) BELOW TREND; AKBNK (1W: -4.53% | 1M: +9.83%) CORRECTION; BIMAS (1W: -4.67% | 1M: -3.79%) BELOW TREND; SASA (1W: -4.76% | 1M: -7.34%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
TUPRS (1W: +13.23% | 1M: +6.89%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +10.51% | 1M: +10.28%) ABOVE TREND; TRALT (1W: +7.75% | 1M: +4.76%) ABOVE TREND; CCOLA (1W: +5.60% | 1M: +8.88%) ABOVE TREND; MGROS (1W: -8.13% | 1M: -4.53%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Selective risk; leaders show month strength but recent selling. GARAN (1W: -3.54% | 1M: +3.09%) CORRECTION; ISCTR (1W: -3.60% | 1M: +3.57%) CORRECTION; YKBNK (1W: -6.49% | 1M: +8.01%) CORRECTION; HALKB (1W: -0.64% | 1M: -3.65%) BELOW TREND.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Mixed and weak breadth; defense and select exporters outperform while autos/steel lag. ASELS (1W: +10.51% | 1M: +10.28%) ABOVE TREND; EREGL (1W: -4.80% | 1M: +0.00%) NEUTRAL; KRDMD (1W: -4.49% | 1M: -2.17%) BELOW TREND; TOASO (1W: -7.08% | 1M: +1.51%) CORRECTION.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
High idiosyncratic dispersion; TUPRS-led rally offsets deep weakness in petrochemical names. TUPRS (1W: +13.23% | 1M: +6.89%) ABOVE TREND; TRALT (1W: +7.75% | 1M: +4.76%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: -4.76% | 1M: -7.34%) BELOW TREND; GUBRF (1W: -4.95% | 1M: -12.73%) BELOW TREND.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Defensive and selective: trim broad beta, add conviction positions in Energy & Chemicals leaders (TUPRS, TRALT) and high-quality industrials (ASELS), keep cash for volatility pick-ups given narrow breadth.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TUPRS (1W: +13.23% | 1M: +6.89%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +10.51% | 1M: +10.28%) ABOVE TREND; THYAO (1W: +0.98% | 1M: +11.43%) ABOVE TREND; AKBNK (1W: -4.53% | 1M: +9.83%) CORRECTION.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Energy & Chemicals (follow oil/commodity moves and TUPRS flows); Construction & REIT (earnings/contract updates and ENKAI momentum); Banking & Finance (macros and CBRT commentary).

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Market watching macro headlines (CBRT remarks, CPI prints), oil prices and global risk flux; monitor XU100 reaction to those catalysts and pocket-levels around recent swing lows/highs for position sizing and stop placement.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Low volatility but narrow participation puts market in CAUTION regime; rallies are stock-specific with Energy and select industrials leading while banks, retail and tech lag. Stay selective, favor idiosyncratic longs with clear triggers and keep broad beta underweight until breadth normalizes.
